hero.badge: User Acceptance Testing  Analyst — Job 146184… · Contract
hero.description: UAT analyst with seven years validating digital platforms in regulated financial services. I write and execute user acceptance test scripts, manage defects in Jira and Confluence, and complete sign off in Agile and hybrid release cycles. Contract work includes commercial banking and treasury adjacent reporting, public sector finance systems, and enterprise reinsurance platforms. I report test status clearly to business owners, developers, compliance partners, and vendor teams. CEO, Your Website In 7 Days LLC. Available immediately for remote temp work from northern Illinois on PST business hours with direct billing to the LLC.

highlights.label: User acceptance testing, UAT script development and execution, defect logging triage and retest, Jira, Confluence, Agile and hybrid delivery, commercial banking, treasury payments and cash management validation, vendor and third party platform testing, SQL reconciliation, regulated financial services, regression testing, acceptance sign off documentation

items.title: Senior UAT and Platform Validation Specialist
items.organization: Regulated reinsurance, remote hybrid, Chief Data Office ecosystem
bullets: Wrote and ran UAT scripts for reporting pipelines, Power BI and Tableau dashboards, and finance platforms, including regression and edge case cycles tied to business acceptance criteria before production release.
Logged, prioritized, and retested defects in Jira through closure; documented test results and release status in Confluence for sprint teams and audit partners.
Validated third party data feeds and vendor hosted components against source systems in a regulated environment requiring audit ready sign off.
Prepared sign off summaries with test evidence and wrote status updates for finance, actuarial, and executive sponsors when results did not pass.

items.title: Contract UAT and Reconciliation Analyst
bullets: Validated SQL reporting dashboards and treasury adjacent operational metrics in a regulated commercial banking environment before internal distribution.
Built reconciliation checks, confirmed outputs against source extracts, and documented variances for developer follow up under strict confidentiality requirements.

items.title: Contract UAT and Dashboard Validation Analyst
items.organization: Public sector financial systems, part time contract
bullets: Tested transactional records against source systems and created repeatable validation checklists and discrepancy logs for developer and business resolution.
